---
title: "Ben \"Emilio\" Ojemann"
image: IMG_6773.JPG
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/beojemann/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/beojemann
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Mail
      href: beojemann@ucsb.edu
---

Hi! My name is Ben Ojemann, though I also go by Emilio. I am currently a double major in **Hydrologic Sciences & Policy** and **Physical Geography** at UC Santa Barbara.

I grew up in Seattle, WA where the Pacific Northwest instilled in me a deep love for the great outdoors and the environment. After moving away for undergrad at UCSB, I have committed myself to improving natural resources through rigorous coursework, technical experience, field studies, and research.
